hero.title: AI-Powered Conversations That Convert
hero.subtitle: A smart assistant for answering questions, scheduling appointments, alerts and after-sales service. Works across all your communication channels.
advantages.title: Key Advantages
advantages.subtitle: A smart solution that lets you focus on what truly matters — your patients
advantages.card1.title: Fewer Lost Patients
advantages.card1.desc: Instant automatic responses to every inquiry ensure no lead is forgotten or lost
advantages.card2.title: Higher Appointment Rate
advantages.card2.desc: Automatic scheduling and smart reminders reduce cancellations and increase attendance
advantages.card3.title: Reduced Staff Workload
advantages.card3.desc: The system handles routine questions and scheduling, so the team can focus on patients
advantages.card4.title: 24/7 Availability
advantages.card4.desc: The smart assistant is available any hour — nights, weekends and holidays, non-stop
advantages.card5.title: Consistent Communication
advantages.card5.desc: Uniform, professional messages across every channel — WhatsApp, SMS, website and social media
advantages.card6.title: Patient Journey Insights
advantages.card6.desc: Reports and data analysis on every step of the process — from initial inquiry to follow-up
advantages.getAccess: Get instant access to the platform and start improving your customer experience today
advantages.clinicsUsing: Over 500 dental clinics already use our solution
bento.title: Key Advantages
bento.subtitle: A smart solution that lets you focus on what truly matters — your patients
bento.card1.title: Instant responses
bento.card1.desc: Every inquiry gets an instant, accurate automated reply — day or night. The assistant answers common questions, qualifies leads, and routes complex cases to your team, so no patient waits and no opportunity is missed.
bento.card3.title: Built for clinics
bento.card3.subtitle: Designed around dental workflows
bento.card4.title: Smart reminders
bento.card4.desc: Automated booking, rescheduling, and personalized reminders before each visit reduce no-shows and last-minute cancellations. Patients stay informed, your calendar stays full, and your front desk spends less time on routine calls.
bento.chatQuestions: When can I book an appointment?
How do I prepare for my visit?
How much does a check-up cost?
Can I get a reminder before my visit?
value.title: Value for Business Owners
value.card1.title: Agent-Powered Follow-Up
value.card1.desc: The assistant maintains your patient database and runs smart follow-up groups—e.g. a cleaning was a year ago and it is time to book again, or six months have passed since the last visit. It also sends reminders about upcoming doctor appointments and guides each patient through rebooking onboarding.
value.card2.title: Always On, 24/7
value.card2.desc: The assistant responds around the clock—even at night—with the information patients need, books appointments, accepts cancellations, and reschedules patients directly in your clinic system.
value.card3.title: Direct Optima CRM Integration
value.card3.desc: Optima, by Optima Company, powers Israel's best-known dental CRM. The assistant connects directly—no building separate patient cards, duplicate data entry, or manual records.
value.card4.title: Multilingual Assistant-Secretary
value.card4.desc: The bot works like a full assistant-secretary—communicates in multiple languages, never loses leads, and thoughtfully guides every patient. Your team saves time and can focus on other tasks: growth, quality of care, and practice priorities.
value.card4.visual.msgBot1: I'll reply in your language — lead saved
trouble.banner: We automate all customer communication and solve these problems for you
trouble.instant.title: Instant 24/7 Response
trouble.instant.desc: The AI agent responds immediately, never leaving the customer without an answer
trouble.lessLoad.title: Less Workload
trouble.lessLoad.desc: Routine tasks pass to the digital assistant — you only handle what matters
trouble.scheduling.title: Automatic Scheduling & Reminders
trouble.scheduling.desc: The AI handles booking, updates, visit preparation and follow-up. The system sends automatic reminders to customers, updates the calendar in real time and coordinates changes intelligently. This saves your team hours of work so they can focus on what truly matters — providing quality service to customers
trouble.cases.title: Our Case Studies
trouble.cases.subtitle: Examples of our customers' success with AI solutions
trouble.testimonial: We increased handled inquiries by 50% with automated responses, freeing up time for complex cases
